summary: Exploratory QA covered the PLANNER_WEEK and MEAL_SCREEN meal-add entry points, RecipeSearchPicker icon affordance, and LeftoverPicker compact card layout using mobile default/narrow screenshot evidence plus full frontend regression. No unresolved blocker or major issue remained. YouTube and manual creation intentionally remain route-based for slice5 ownership.
remainingRisks: Claude final authority review could not run because the provided resume session hit provider limits; Codex completed the fallback authority review per user instruction.
Real DB smoke was not run because this is a FE-only presentation change with unchanged API/DB/state transition contracts.
